name: Buckeyes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Crunchy peanut butter (or crunchy works fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well until combined.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls.
3. Dip each ball into a mixture of 6 oz melted chocolate chips and 1/4 stick of paraffin.
4. Let stand on a rack for the chocolate to drip off and firm up.
Alternatively, pat the peanut butter mixture into a buttered pan and top with melted chocolate chips, marking it into small squares before the chocolate gets totally firm. After standing overnight, cut into pieces. These taste just like Reese's cups and keep well in an airtight container.
